homepage.heroHeadline: Onyx Pest Control: Tampa Bay's Trusted Exterminators
homepage.heroSubline: Locally owned pest solutions since 2012. Serving Tampa Bay homes with same-day emergency service available for active infestations.
aboutText: Founded by Tampa native James Wilson after seeing how subtropical pests damage our historic bungalows and waterfront properties.
We use environmentally responsible methods adapted for Florida's humid climate, from termite-resistant treatments for old wood floors to salt-air approved materials for coastal homes.
Proud supporters of Tampa PAL youth programs and annual sponsors of Gasparilla Festival cleanup crews.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Urgent Response

homepage.ctaSubline: Call or text 555-PES-T93 for immediate assistance with ants, rodents, or termites in your Tampa home.

services.name: Termite Control
services.shortDescription: Advanced protection for Tampa's older homes against destructive subterranean and drywood termites.
services.description:
Florida's humid climate creates ideal conditions for termites to silently destroy historic bungalow floor joists and waterfront property foundations. Our Tampa-trained technicians use moisture meters to identify high-risk areas in your crawl spaces before applying time-released treatments.

For pre-1950s homes in Hyde Park or Ybor City, we recommend our non-invasive borate wood treatment that penetrates deep into structural beams without damaging original finishes. Newer suburban homes in Westchase benefit from our perimeter trenching system that creates a protective barrier against swarming termites after summer rains.

Includes 10-year renewable warranty with annual inspections. Emergency service available when winged termites suddenly appear after thunderstorms.
process: Step 1: Thermal imaging inspection of walls/floors
Step 2: Targeted drilling for direct wood treatment (only where absolutely needed)
Step 3: Soil injection around foundation perimeter
Step 4: Quarterly monitoring stations installed
benefits: Safe for homes near Tampa Bay's sensitive estuaries
Custom solutions for historic district requirements

faq.question: How often should Tampa homes be inspected for termites?
faq.answer: Annually for most properties, but every 6 months for older homes near water or with previous infestations. Summer humidity accelerates colony growth.

faq.question: Will treatment disrupt my daily routine?
faq.answer: Most treatments take 2-3 hours with minimal movement of furniture. We avoid disrupting original hardwood floors in historic homes.

faq.question: Are your chemicals safe for pets?
faq.answer: We use pet-friendly products that dry within 2 hours. For homes with birds or reptiles, we offer completely organic alternatives.

services.name: Rodent Exclusion
services.shortDescription: Complete rat and mouse proofing for Tampa Bay area homes.
services.description:
From rats nesting in palm tree crowns to mice sneaking through old fireplace flues in Seminole Heights bungalows, we seal entry points with heavy-duty materials that withstand Florida's storms. Our process begins with a thorough inspection of your attic, roof lines, and foundation - common entry points after hurricanes displace rodent populations.

For 1920s craftsman homes, we use copper mesh and steel wool that blends with original architecture while preventing gnawing. Newer suburban homes receive complete perimeter sealing with corrosion-resistant materials ideal for salty Gulf breezes in South Tampa.

Includes follow-up visits during winter months when rodents seek warmth in garages and pool enclosures. Humane live traps available upon request for wildlife concerns.
process: Step 1: Nighttime activity assessment with infrared cameras
Step 2: Identification of all entry points larger than 1/4 inch
Step 3: Custom sealing of gaps with rodent-proof materials
Step 4: Attic decontamination if needed
benefits: Prevents electrical fires from chewed wiring
Reduces risk of leptospirosis in flood-prone areas
Storm-resistant materials won't degrade in rain
Humane solutions that comply with FL wildlife laws

faq.question: How do hurricanes affect rodent problems?
faq.answer: Storm surges force rats inland - we see 300% more calls after major storms. Our preventions help keep them out when waters rise.

faq.question: Do you handle roof rats in palm trees?
faq.answer: Yes, we install protective trunk guards and trim overhanging branches that provide access to your roof.

faq.question: Will sealing make my house too airtight?
faq.answer: We maintain proper ventilation while blocking pests - crucial for Florida's humid climate to prevent mold.

services.name: Mosquito Misting
services.shortDescription: Outdoor protection from disease-carrying mosquitoes in Tampa's humid climate.
services.description:
Our automated misting systems create a protective barrier around your pool cage or lanai - areas where Tampa families spend evenings but battle relentless mosquitoes. The system releases micro-doses of EPA-approved formulas at dawn/dusk when mosquitoes are most active near standing water.

Customizable for different property types: historic home gardens in Hyde Park require discreet installation that preserves landscape aesthetics, while larger estates on Tampa's canals benefit from our commercial-grade systems that cover waterfront exposures.

Includes free seasonal adjustments - we increase frequency during rainy season (June-October) and add extra protection before outdoor parties. All nozzles are salt-air resistant for coastal properties.
process: Step 1: Property mapping of mosquito hotspots
Step 2: Strategic nozzle placement planning
Step 3: Installation of weatherproof control unit
Step 4: Monthly refills and system checks
benefits: Reduces risk of Zika and West Nile virus
Smart timer saves product during windy days

faq.question: How does this differ from regular spraying?
faq.answer: Misting provides continuous protection rather than temporary relief. The micro-dosing is more effective and uses less chemical overall.

faq.question: Will it harm my butterfly garden?
faq.answer: We adjust formulas and timing to protect pollinators - treatments occur when butterflies are least active.

faq.question: What about after heavy rains?
faq.answer: Systems automatically increase frequency for 48 hours post-storm when mosquito breeding spikes.

services.name: Bed Bug Treatment
services.shortDescription: Discreet and thorough elimination for Tampa hotels and residences.
services.description:
Bed bugs thrive in Tampa's tourist areas, hitching rides from cruise ships and vacation rentals. Our heat treatment method reaches 135°F - hot enough to kill all life stages without chemicals that can damage antique furniture in historic apartments.

For high-rise condos along Bayshore Boulevard, we use canine inspections to pinpoint infestations before they spread through shared walls. Budget-conscious solutions available for student housing near USF that prevent reinfestation between semesters.

Includes two follow-up visits and complimentary suitcase heat treatments for frequent travelers. Hotel partnerships receive discounted quarterly preventative services.
process: Step 1: K-9 inspection or visual assessment
Step 2: Targeted heat treatment (6-8 hours)
Step 3: Residual barrier application
Step 4: Follow-up monitoring

faq.question: How do I prepare for heat treatment?
faq.answer: Remove heat-sensitive items like candles and medications. We handle moving furniture to optimal positions.

faq.question: Are your methods safe for elderly residents?
faq.answer: Absolutely - we coordinate with caregivers to ensure comfort during the process.

faq.question: Will neighbors know we had bed bugs?
faq.answer: Our unmarked vehicles and discreet protocols maintain your privacy.

services.name: Palmetto Bug Control
services.shortDescription: Solutions for Florida's notorious giant roaches in Tampa homes.
services.description:
Palmetto bugs invade through plumbing penetrations and attic vents, especially during Tampa's humid summers. Our interior/exterior treatment focuses on their preferred harborage areas: dark moist spaces under sinks, around AC units, and in pool equipment rooms.

For historic district homes with original plumbing, we use gel baits in wall voids rather than disruptive drilling. Modern condos receive targeted applications along elevator shafts and garbage chutes - common entry points in high-rises.

Includes emergency call-outs when sudden infestations occur after tropical storms. Our natural repellent options help keep them away from outdoor dining areas without harming Tampa's ecosystem.
process: Step 1: Identification of entry points and harborage
Step 2: Application of growth regulator to prevent reproduction
Step 3: Strategic bait placement in wall voids
Step 4: Exclusion work on plumbing penetrations

faq.question: Why do I suddenly have palmetto bugs?
faq.answer: They often appear after heavy rains flood their outdoor nests. Our treatments create a protective barrier before storm season.

faq.question: Are the giant ones dangerous?
faq.answer: While not venomous, they carry bacteria and trigger allergies. Their shed skin particles worsen asthma symptoms.

faq.question: Will fogging get rid of them?
faq.answer: Fogging only kills visible bugs - we target the nests and entry points for complete control.

reviews.name: Marta R.
reviews.text: Saved our 1936 bungalow in Seminole Heights from extensive termite damage. James found active mud tubes behind original baseboards that 2 other companies missed. Their borate treatment preserved the heart pine floors we just refinished.

reviews.name: Darrell W.
reviews.text: After Hurricane Idalia, rats were getting into our South Tampa garage through the old laundry chute. Onyx sealed every possible entry with materials that blend perfectly with our historic home's exterior. No more midnight scratching noises!

reviews.name: Sophia K.
reviews.text: The misting system around our pool cage has been life-changing. Our kids can finally play outside in the evenings without being eaten alive. Technician adjusted the nozzles to account for our canal location - much fewer mosquitoes this rainy season.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Discovered bed bugs after a cruise from Port Tampa Bay. Onyx's heat treatment eradicated them in one day without having to throw out our mattress. Appreciated their discreet service - our downtown condo neighbors never knew.

reviews.name: Lisa T.
reviews.text: Living near Bayshore meant constant palmetto bugs in our kitchen. The quarterly treatments have reduced sightings by 90%. They even found nests in our outdoor shower we didn't know about. Worth every penny for peace of mind.

reviews.name: Greg B.
reviews.text: As a property manager for several old homes in Ybor City, I trust Onyx for all our pest control. They understand the unique challenges of historic buildings and work around our tight tenant schedules. Their 10-year warranty gives owners real protection.

serviceAreas.content:
Onyx Pest Control provides expert pest management services for the historic homes of St. Petersburg, FL. Our team is well-versed in treating common pests like termites, roaches, and rodents that thrive in the humid climate of the Tampa Bay area. We use environmentally friendly methods to protect your 1920s-50s Florida cottage home while ensuring effective pest elimination.

St. Petersburg's unique architecture and lush landscapes require specialized pest control solutions. Whether you're dealing with palmetto bugs, ants, or mosquitoes, our tailored treatments address the specific needs of your property. We also offer preventative services to keep your home pest-free year-round in this hot, humid climate.
serviceAreas.localContext: St. Petersburg is known for its historic Florida cottage homes and vibrant arts scene, with a climate that fosters rapid pest reproduction.

serviceAreas.content:
Serving Clearwater's ranch-style homes, Onyx Pest Control delivers comprehensive pest solutions for this coastal community. Our technicians understand how the salty air and humidity create ideal conditions for pests like silverfish, spiders, and termites in 1960s-70s properties. We offer specialized treatments for beachside properties that face unique pest challenges.

From barrier treatments to interior pest proofing, we protect Clearwater homes against the area's most persistent invaders. Our seasonal maintenance plans are particularly valuable in this climate where pests remain active throughout the year.
serviceAreas.localContext: Clearwater's ranch-style homes and proximity to the Gulf create specific pest control needs in this popular beach destination.
